title: Vomiting follow-up
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Specifies distinction between nausea, vomiting, retching, and regurgitation and records duration, frequency, associated symptoms, intake, and likely causes.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08
source.population: People presenting with nausea or vomiting; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth nausea and vomiting documentation; partial for a general in-person GP workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies distinction between nausea, vomiting, retching, and regurgitation and records duration, frequency, associated symptoms, intake, and likely causes.

assessment.text: Specifies distinction between nausea, vomiting, retching, and regurgitation and records duration, frequency, associated symptoms, intake, and likely causes.
assessment.rationale: The exact DHA section supports interval vomiting frequency and character, triggers, intake, hydration history, associated symptoms, pregnancy, medicine, and impact without assigning a cause.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08
source.population: People presenting with nausea or vomiting; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.

source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth nausea and vomiting documentation; partial for a general in-person GP workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies distinction between nausea, vomiting, retching, and regurgitation and records duration, frequency, associated symptoms, intake, and likely causes.

assessment.text: Lists severe abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, neurological symptoms, chest pain, weight loss, dehydration, altered state, and metabolic concerns.
assessment.rationale: The exact red-flag section supports clinician-assessed hydration, general status, and concern documentation without asserting absence.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08
source.population: People presenting with nausea or vomiting; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth nausea and vomiting documentation; partial for a general in-person GP workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists severe abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, neurological symptoms, chest pain, weight loss, dehydration, altered state, and metabolic concerns.

assessment.text: States that testing is history-directed and lists glucose, blood count, inflammatory markers, electrolytes, stool culture, and urinalysis.
assessment.rationale: The exact section supports recording already available laboratory or imaging results without ordering tests.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Nausea and Vomiting – 08
source.population: People presenting with nausea or vomiting; no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth nausea and vomiting documentation; partial for a general in-person GP workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: States that testing is history-directed and lists glucose, blood count, inflammatory markers, electrolytes, stool culture, and urinalysis.

assessment.text: Lists urgent referral features including haematemesis, neurological symptoms, chest pain, acute abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, and immunosuppression.
assessment.rationale: The exact section supports clinician-entered safety net, follow-up, and escalation status without assigning urgency.
